name: @forwardimpact/libwiki
description: Wiki lifecycle primitives — stable memory for agent teams so coordination persists across sessions.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: An agent finishes a session and its findings vanish because there is no shared memory to write them to.
jobs.bigHire: give agent teams stable memory that persists across sessions.
jobs.littleHire: send a memo or update a storyboard without managing the wiki infrastructure.
jobs.competesWith: git commit messages as memory; ephemeral conversation context; starting every session from scratch
